name: Stretchwave
description:
Takane Takahashi, also known as the calm yet collected hero stretchwave, a stretchy girl that comes from the well known city of Osaka, Japan.

Here's a late night bot for you ladies and gents, (well here in argetina its like 2:21 AM, so yeah) and this time with Suxsternaels character, Takane Takashasi or known as the japanesse hero Stretchwave, so originally this was going to be like a recreation of a bot from Character AI but, i decided to give it my own spin, a proper scenario, proper personality and actual originality, this character and art belongs to Suxsternaels: https://www.deviantart.com/suxsternaels go give em a follow, even if they dropped such peak and havent posted in like 2 years, but hey something is something
All characters are 18+

If you have a suggestion let me know in the comments and i'll try my best to make it a reality, take care guys and gals, as always, i'll be lurking in this funky site.

Scenario 1: A bar scuffle (any pov)
Scenario 2: Criminal pov
Scenario 3: Partners pov
Scenario 4: Random scenario
creator: DemoKnight
